---
title: "plots"
author: '18004789'
date: "2025-08-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(rstudioapi)
library(rstan)
library(shinystan)
library(ggplot2)
library(bayesplot)
library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)

n_draws <- 1500

# Posterior for the mean curve (no Sigma)
mu_draws <- matrix(NA, nrow = J, ncol = n_draws)
for (s in 1:n_draws) {
  mu_draws[, s] <- as.vector(X_poly %*% beta_samples[s, ])
}
mu_median <- apply(mu_draws, 1, median)
mu_lower  <- apply(mu_draws, 1, quantile, 0.025)
mu_upper  <- apply(mu_draws, 1, quantile, 0.975)

y_rep_draws <- matrix(NA, nrow = J, ncol = n_draws)
for (s in 1:n_draws) {
  mu_s <- as.numeric(mu_draws[, s])
  Sigma_s <- as.matrix(Sigma_samples[s, , ])
  # Draw a synthetic vector of performances at all ages for this athlete
  y_rep_draws[, s] <- MASS::mvrnorm(1, mu = mu_s, Sigma = Sigma_s)
}
y_pred_median <- apply(y_rep_draws, 1, median)
y_pred_lower  <- apply(y_rep_draws, 1, quantile, 0.025)
y_pred_upper  <- apply(y_rep_draws, 1, quantile, 0.975)

n <- 44   #240 279
ages_n <- age_idx[n, 1:obs_count[n]]
obs_perf <- y_matrix[n, 1:obs_count[n]]

plot_df <- data.frame(
  age = unique_ages,
  mu_median = mu_median,
  mu_lower = mu_lower,
  mu_upper = mu_upper,
  y_pred_median = y_pred_median,
  y_pred_lower = y_pred_lower,
  y_pred_upper = y_pred_upper
)

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = age)) +
  # Predictive interval ribbon (widest, includes Sigma)
  # geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = y_pred_lower, ymax = y_pred_upper), fill = "orange", alpha = 0.25) +
  # Median credible interval ribbon (narrower)
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mu_lower, ymax = mu_upper), fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  # Median trajectory
  geom_line(aes(y = mu_median), color = "blue", size = 1) +
  # Posterior predictive median
  # geom_line(aes(y = y_pred_median), color = "orange", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
  # Observed data for this athlete
  geom_point(data = data.frame(
    age = unique_ages[ages_n],
    observed = obs_perf
  ), aes(x = age, y = observed), color = "black", size = 2) +
  labs(title = "Athlete fit", x = "Age (Years)", y = "Performance (Seconds)") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```




```{r}
performance_df <- trim_sb %>% select(original_ID, AgeInt, Result)
performance_female_df <- trim_sb_female %>% select(original_ID, AgeInt, Result)

age_means <- performance_df %>%
  group_by(AgeInt) %>%
  summarize(mean_perf = mean(Result, na.rm = TRUE))

age_female_means <- performance_female_df %>%
  group_by(AgeInt) %>%
  summarize(mean_perf = mean(Result, na.rm = TRUE))
```

```{r}
p_male <- ggplot(age_means, aes(x = AgeInt, y = mean_perf)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "black", size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Male",
    x = "Age (Years)",
    y = "Mean Performance (Seconds)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Female plot
p_female <- ggplot(age_female_means, aes(x = AgeInt, y = mean_perf)) +
  geom_line(color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "black", size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Female",
    x = "Age (Years)",
    y = "Mean Performance (Seconds)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

p_combined <- gridExtra::arrangeGrob(p_male, p_female, ncol = 2)
ggsave("male_female_avg_age_performance.png", p_combined,
       width = 12, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
fe_fit_male_3000<- readRDS(file = 'fe_fit_3000.rds')
fe_fit_female_3000<- readRDS(file = 'fe_fit_female_3000.rds')

posterior_male_fe <- extract(fe_fit_male_3000)
posterior_female_fe <- extract(fe_fit_female_3000)


beta_male_fe_samples <- posterior_male_fe$beta
Sigma_male_fe_draws <- posterior_male_fe$Sigma

beta_female_fe_samples <- posterior_female_fe$beta
Sigma_female_fe_draws <- posterior_female_fe$Sigma
```


```{r}
c_alt <- trim_observed_ages$all_ages[[1]] - 23.5
X_poly <- cbind(
  1,
  c_alt,
  c_alt^2,
  c_alt^3,
  c_alt^4
)
```



```{r}
mu_draws <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = J, ncol = S)
for (s in 1:S) mu_draws[, s] <- as.vector(X_poly %*% beta_male_fe_samples[s, ])

mu_median <- apply(mu_draws, 1, median)
mu_lower  <- apply(mu_draws, 1, quantile, 0.025)
mu_upper  <- apply(mu_draws, 1, quantile, 0.975)

df_mu <- data.frame(
  age       = unique_ages,
  mu_median = mu_median,
  mu_lower  = mu_lower,
  mu_upper  = mu_upper
)

ggplot(df_mu, aes(x = age)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mu_lower, ymax = mu_upper), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mu_median), size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Posterior Population Mean Trajectory",
       x = "Age (Years)", y = "Performance (Seconds)")
```

```{r}
make_mu_plot <- function(beta_samples, title_text) {
  S <- nrow(beta_samples)
  mu_draws <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = J, ncol = S)
  for (s in 1:S) mu_draws[, s] <- as.vector(X_poly %*% beta_samples[s, ])
  
  mu_median <- apply(mu_draws, 1, median)
  mu_lower  <- apply(mu_draws, 1, quantile, 0.025)
  mu_upper  <- apply(mu_draws, 1, quantile, 0.975)
  
  df_mu <- data.frame(
    age       = unique_ages,
    mu_median = mu_median,
    mu_lower  = mu_lower,
    mu_upper  = mu_upper
  )
  
  ggplot(df_mu, aes(x = age)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mu_lower, ymax = mu_upper), alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mu_median)) +
    labs(title = title_text, x = "Age (Years)", y = "Performance (Seconds)") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    )
}

p_male   <- make_mu_plot(beta_male_fe_samples,   "Male")
p_female <- make_mu_plot(beta_female_fe_samples, "Female")

gridExtra::grid.arrange(p_male, p_female, ncol = 2)

p_combined <- gridExtra::grid.arrange(p_male, p_female, ncol = 2)
ggsave("male_female_trajectories2.png", p_combined,
       width = 12, height = 4, dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
plot_athlete <- function(n, title_text) {
  mu_draws <- matrix(NA, nrow = J, ncol = S)
  for (s in 1:S) {
    mu_draws[, s] <- as.vector(X_poly %*% beta_male_fe_samples[s, ])
  }
  mu_median <- apply(mu_draws, 1, median)
  mu_lower  <- apply(mu_draws, 1, quantile, 0.025)
  mu_upper  <- apply(mu_draws, 1, quantile, 0.975)
  
  obs_idx <- age_idx[n, 1:obs_count[n]]
  y_obs <- y_matrix[n, 1:obs_count[n]]
  
  df_mu <- data.frame(
    age = unique_ages,
    mu_median = mu_median,
    mu_lower = mu_lower,
    mu_upper = mu_upper
  )
  
  df_obs <- data.frame(
    age = unique_ages[obs_idx],
    observed = y_obs
  )

  ggplot(df_mu, aes(x = age)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mu_lower, ymax = mu_upper), fill = "skyblue", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mu_median), color = "blue", size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = df_obs, aes(x = age, y = observed), color = "black", size = 2) +
    ylim(9.56, 11.1) +
    labs(title = title_text, x = "Age (Years)", y = "Performance (Seconds)") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
}
```


```{r}
plot_conditional <- function(n) {
  k <- obs_count[n]
  obs_idx <- age_idx[n, 1:k]
  y_obs   <- y_matrix[n, 1:k]
  
  all_idx  <- 1:J
  miss_idx <- setdiff(all_idx, obs_idx)
  S <- nrow(beta_samples)
  
  pred_draws_all <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = J, ncol = S)
  
  for (s in 1:S) {
    mu    <- as.vector(X_poly %*% beta_samples[s, ])
    Sigma <- Sigma_samples[s, , ]
    
    mu_obs <- mu[obs_idx]
    S_oo   <- Sigma[obs_idx, obs_idx, drop = FALSE]
    r      <- y_obs - mu_obs
    
    Q_oo   <- solve(S_oo)
    Qr     <- Q_oo %*% r
    qdiag  <- diag(Q_oo)
    
    mu_loo  <- as.numeric(y_obs - Qr / qdiag)
    var_loo <- 1 / qdiag
    y_obs_pred <- rnorm(k, mean = mu_loo, sd = sqrt(pmax(var_loo, 0)))
    
    mu_miss <- mu[miss_idx]
    S_om    <- Sigma[obs_idx,  miss_idx, drop = FALSE]
    S_mo    <- t(S_om)
    S_mm    <- Sigma[miss_idx, miss_idx, drop = FALSE]
    
    alpha <- solve(S_oo, r)
    tmp   <- solve(S_oo, S_om)
    
    mu_cond    <- as.vector(mu_miss + S_mo %*% alpha)
    Sigma_cond <- S_mm - S_mo %*% tmp
    
    y_miss_pred <- as.vector(mvrnorm(1, mu_cond, Sigma_cond))
    
    draw_s <- rep(NA_real_, J)
    draw_s[obs_idx]  <- y_obs_pred
    draw_s[miss_idx] <- y_miss_pred
    pred_draws_all[, s] <- draw_s
  }
  
  pred_median <- apply(pred_draws_all, 1, median, na.rm = TRUE)
  pred_lower  <- apply(pred_draws_all, 1, quantile, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)
  pred_upper  <- apply(pred_draws_all, 1, quantile, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  df_pred <- data.frame(
    age    = unique_ages,
    median = pred_median,
    lower  = pred_lower,
    upper  = pred_upper
  )
  
  df_obs <- data.frame(
    age      = unique_ages[obs_idx],
    observed = y_obs
  )
  
  ggplot(df_pred, aes(x = age)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), fill = "blue", alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_line(aes(y = median), color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(data = df_obs, aes(y = observed), color = "black", size = 2) +
    ylim(9.56, 11.1) +
    labs(x = "Age", y = "Performance")
}
```

```{r}
n_vec <- c(28, 171, 39)
titles_vec <- c("Athlete 1", "Athlete 2", "Athlete 3")
plots_avg <- Map(plot_athlete, n_vec, titles_vec)

plots_pred <- lapply(n_vec, plot_conditional)

plot_list_all <- c(plots_avg, plots_pred)

grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list_all, nrow = 2, ncol = 3)

p_combined <- arrangeGrob(grobs = plot_list_all, nrow = 2, ncol = 3)

ggsave("3_athlete_dist.png", p_combined,
       width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```
